governing_principle: Failure in quality validation must block publication. No exceptions without explicit owner approval and a DECISION_LOG.md entry.

route_gate.purpose: Ensures every page is registered, purposeful, and governance-compliant before publication is considered.
required_checks: path is registered in data/routes.json
purpose field is populated
status is 'approved' (not 'planned' or 'drafted')
canonical URL is defined
page_role is declared
ux_layer is assigned
route_gate.failure_condition: Any unregistered path, missing purpose, or non-approved status blocks publication.

seo_gate.purpose: Ensures every indexable page meets the SEO technical requirements defined in TECHNICAL_STANDARD.md and ROUTE_GOVERNANCE.md.
required_checks: title tag is present and unique across all routes
meta description is present and controlled
exactly one H1 is present
heading hierarchy is logical (H1 then H2 then H3)
canonical URL is set and matches routes.json
indexability is explicitly declared
no duplicate title or description across registered routes
structured data is valid where present
seo_gate.failure_condition: Missing or duplicate metadata, broken heading hierarchy, or absent canonical tag blocks publication.

content_gate.purpose: Ensures content meets the sovereign quality standard: institutional, precise, strategic, and trustworthy.
required_checks: no placeholder text present
no filler paragraphs
no unsupported claims
no blocked claim types as defined in data/claim-types.json
content meets minimum depth appropriate to page role
all claims are classified according to data/claim-types.json
no hype, fake urgency, or exaggerated performance promises
content_gate.failure_condition: Presence of placeholder content, unclassified claims, or blocked claim types blocks publication.

link_gate.purpose: Ensures the internal link architecture is complete, valid, and non-isolating.
required_checks: all internal links resolve to paths registered in data/routes.json
no dead internal links
no dead external links
page has at least one internal link pointing to it from another published page
all required_internal_links from data/routes.json are present on the page
no links to routes with status 'planned' or 'drafted'
link_gate.failure_condition: Any broken link, orphaned page, or missing required internal link blocks publication.

technical_gate.purpose: Ensures the implementation meets the static-first, accessible, and secure technical standard.
required_checks: HTML passes W3C validator
page renders correctly without JavaScript
no eval() usage
no unescaped user input rendering
no exposed credentials or secrets
security headers are configured or planned
no unapproved third-party scripts
technical_gate.failure_condition: Validation failure, JavaScript dependency for core content, or security issue blocks publication.

performance_gate.purpose: Ensures the page meets performance standards appropriate for a sovereign-grade digital asset.
required_checks: page passes Core Web Vitals on mobile
page passes Core Web Vitals on desktop
images are optimized
no render-blocking scripts without defer or async
no unnecessary third-party scripts
no excessive font loading
performance_gate.failure_condition: Core Web Vitals failure or render-blocking resources block publication.

accessibility_gate.purpose: Ensures the interface is accessible without motion, 3D, or JavaScript dependency.
required_checks: all images have meaningful alt text
color contrast meets WCAG AA minimum ratio
all interactive elements are keyboard-navigable
no content requires motion or 3D to understand
spatial effects are progressive enhancements only
accessibility_gate.failure_condition: Any content that is inaccessible without motion, 3D, or JavaScript blocks publication.

monetization_gate.purpose: Ensures no monetization element is introduced that could damage strategic value or violate the monetization boundary.
required_checks: no unapproved monetization elements present
no random display ads
no popups that damage asset dignity
any monetization element is listed in data/monetization-rules.json approved_models
current_phase in data/monetization-rules.json permits the monetization model present
DECISION_LOG.md entry exists for any monetization element introduced
monetization_gate.failure_condition: Any prohibited monetization pattern or out-of-phase monetization model blocks publication.

security_gate.purpose: Ensures the published page does not introduce attack surface, credential exposure, or unreviewed external dependencies.
required_checks: no secrets in source code
no tracking scripts without documented approval
no third-party scripts without security review
Content-Security-Policy header is planned or active
no eval() or unsafe-inline without explicit justification
no uncontrolled redirects
no user-generated content rendered without sanitization
security_gate.failure_condition: Any security policy violation blocks publication and triggers a DECISION_LOG.md entry.
